channel.title: Services on M. Farstad | Full Stack Software Developer
channel.description: Recent content in Services on M. Farstad | Full Stack Software Developer

item.title: Desktop Applications
item.description: I’ve built single-page and multiple-page applications on Windows and Linux. Use cases range from administrative assistance to machine learning to music composition. And that’s just the software I was paid to write.

item.title: Embedded IOT
item.description: Label printer emulators, smart vending machines, Touch-screen UI, master/slave MCU message passing, and ultra-low-latency audio are just a few of the direct contributions I have made in my career.

item.title: Mobile Applications
item.description: By leveraging Flutter I target both Android and iOS at once. I can build mobile apps for any business need, without sacrificing appearance or user experience.
